feature: AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
workflow_rationale: Multi-service feature touching bop-core (data model), bop-cli (CLI rendering + TUI), macOS Quick Look (Swift), and dispatch.nu (Nushell). Phases follow service dependency: core model → plan loader → CLI rendering → Quick Look → dispatch linkage → output.

phases.name: Core Data Model — ac_spec_id field
phases.description: Add ac_spec_id: Option<String> to the Meta struct in bop-core, with serde annotations and round-trip tests.

subtasks.description: Add ac_spec_id field to Meta struct with serde annotation, add to Default impl, write round-trip test proving the field serializes to JSON as 'ac_spec_id' and omits when None
subtasks.notes: Added ac_spec_id: Option<String> to Meta struct with #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] annotation. Added to Default impl as None. Two tests: meta_ac_spec_id_round_trips (verifies serialization key and round-trip) and meta_ac_spec_id_omitted_when_none (verifies omission). All 106 bop-core tests pass.

phases.name: Plan Loader Module
phases.description: Create acplan.rs module in bop-cli with AcPlan types, JSON parser, git root discovery, spec dir resolution, and CardView enrichment function.

subtasks.description: Create crates/bop-cli/src/acplan.rs with AcPlan/AcPhase/AcSubtask structs (serde Deserialize), parse_plan(path) function, and half_circle_glyph(frac) using spec thresholds (○=0%, ◔=1-33%, ◑=34-66%, ◕=67-99%, ●=100%). Add mod acplan to main.rs.
subtasks.notes: Created crates/bop-cli/src/acplan.rs with AcPlan/AcPhase/AcSubtask structs (serde Deserialize), parse_plan(path) function, and half_circle_glyph(frac) using spec thresholds (○=0%, ◔=1-33%, ◑=34-66%, ◕=67-99%, ●=100%). Added mod acplan to main.rs. Fixed missing ac_spec_id field in 10 Meta struct initializers in cards.rs. All 18 acplan tests pass.

subtasks.description: Add find_git_root(start_dir) and resolve_spec_dir(git_root, ac_spec_id) functions to acplan.rs. find_git_root walks parent dirs looking for .git or .auto-claude (max 6 levels). resolve_spec_dir globs <git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<id>-* for the spec directory. Returns Option<PathBuf> for the implementation_plan.json path.
subtasks.notes: Added find_git_root(start_dir) and resolve_spec_dir(git_root, ac_spec_id) to acplan.rs. find_git_root walks parent dirs (max 6 levels) looking for .git or .auto-claude markers. resolve_spec_dir globs .auto-claude/specs/<id>-*/implementation_plan.json. 9 tests passing.

subtasks.description: Add plan_summary(plan) function returning (completed, total, current_phase_name, current_phase_frac) tuple. Add enrich_card_view(card_view, cards_root) function that: checks if Meta has ac_spec_id, calls resolve_spec_dir, loads plan, calls plan_summary, populates CardView.phase_name/phase_frac/progress and new ac_subtasks_done/ac_subtasks_total fields.
subtasks.notes: plan_summary() and enrich_card_view() fully implemented with comprehensive tests. PlanSummary struct returns completed/total/current_phase_name/current_phase_frac. enrich_card_view checks ac_spec_id, resolves spec dir, loads plan, populates CardView.phase_name/phase_frac/progress. 6 plan_summary tests + 3 enrich_card_view tests all passing (36 total acplan tests). Code was already committed in prior sessions.

phases.name: CLI Rendering — bop list + status --watch
phases.description: Extend CardView with subtask counts, update all renderers to show N/T + half-circle, wire plan enrichment into collect_card_views, and update watch mode to reload plans.

subtasks.description: Add ac_subtasks_done: Option<usize> and ac_subtasks_total: Option<usize> fields to CardView in render/mod.rs. Update from_meta() to set both to None. Update all existing test helper card() functions in render/*.rs and ui/widgets/*.rs to include the new fields.
subtasks.notes: Added ac_subtasks_done: Option<usize> and ac_subtasks_total: Option<usize> fields to CardView struct in render/mod.rs. Updated from_meta() to set both to None. Updated all 9 test helper functions (card/test_card/rich_card) across render/dumb.rs, render/basic.rs, render/extended.rs, render/full.rs, render/truecolor.rs, ui/widgets/kanban.rs, ui/widgets/detail.rs, ui/input.rs, and ui/mod.rs. All 838 tests pass.

subtasks.description: Update render_progress() in full.rs (and other renderers that support it) to show 'N/T' count when ac_subtasks_done/total are set, and use half_circle_glyph from acplan.rs instead of moon_glyph when plan data is present. The format becomes: '████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑'. Update kanban.rs build_progress_line similarly.
subtasks.notes: Updated render_progress() in full.rs, extended.rs, truecolor.rs to show N/T count when ac_subtasks_done/total are set, and use half_circle_glyph from acplan.rs instead of moon_glyph when plan data is present. Updated build_progress_line in kanban.rs similarly. Also updated CardRenderer trait signature to accept ac_done/ac_total params, updated all 5 renderer implementations (dumb, basic, extended, full, truecolor), and wired up enrich_card_view to populate ac_subtasks_done/total fields. All 872 tests pass.

subtasks.description: Wire plan enrichment into collect_card_views() in list.rs: after from_meta(), if meta has ac_spec_id, call acplan::enrich_card_view() to populate plan data. Need to pass the .cards root path (or git root) so the enrichment function can find the spec dir. Also update collect_card_groups if needed.
subtasks.notes: Wired acplan::enrich_card_view() into collect_card_views() in list.rs. Added `use crate::acplan;` import. Updated collect_card_groups() to compute git_root once via acplan::find_git_root(root) and pass it as Option<&Path> to collect_card_views(). Updated collect_card_views() to accept git_root param and call acplan::enrich_card_view(&mut view, &meta, gr) for each card when git_root is available. All 26 list tests pass.

subtasks.description: Update list_cards_watch() to also reload implementation_plan.json on change events. The fs watcher already watches .cards/ recursively — additionally watch .auto-claude/specs/ for plan changes. Or alternatively, reload plan data on every redraw (since redraw only happens on stats_changed). Ensure plan data changes trigger redraw.
subtasks.notes: Updated list_cards_watch() to also watch .auto-claude/specs/ for implementation_plan.json changes. Added git root discovery via acplan::find_git_root(root) to locate specs dir. Changed channel type from () to bool: true = plan changed (force redraw), false = card changed (check stats_changed). Event filter detects both .bop extension events and implementation_plan.json file changes. Plan changes force a redraw even when card counts are unchanged. All 26 list tests pass.

phases.name: Quick Look — Plan Tab
phases.description: Add Plan tab to Quick Look preview showing phase/subtask progress with SF Symbol icons. New Codable structs for AcPlan, git root discovery, lazy loading.

subtasks.description: Add acSpecId: String? to BopCardMeta with CodingKey 'ac_spec_id'. Add AcPlan, AcPhase, AcSubtask private Codable structs. Add 'plan' case to CardTab enum (shown only when acSpecId is set and plan loads). Add @State var acPlan: AcPlan? to BopCardPreview.

verification.command: xcodebuild -project macos/macos.xcodeproj -scheme JobCardHost -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | tail -5

subtasks.notes: Added acSpecId: String? to BopCardMeta with CodingKey 'ac_spec_id'. Added AcPlan, AcPhase, AcSubtask private Codable structs. Added 'plan' case to CardTab enum with conditional visibility (shown only when acSpecId is set and acPlan loads). Added @State var acPlan: AcPlan? to BopCardPreview. Added availableTabs computed property that filters plan tab. Added tabName support for plan tab showing done/total counts. Added stub planTab() view builder. Updated tab bar to use availableTabs. BUILD SUCCEEDED.

subtasks.description: Implement git root discovery: walk parent dirs from cardURL max 6 levels looking for .auto-claude dir. Add findGitRoot(from:) helper. In preparePreviewOfFile, if meta.acSpecId is set, resolve the spec dir and load implementation_plan.json. Pass the loaded AcPlan to BopCardPreview.

verification.command: xcodebuild -project macos/macos.xcodeproj -scheme JobCardHost -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | tail -5

subtasks.notes: Added findGitRoot(from:) helper that walks parent dirs from cardURL (max 6 levels) looking for .auto-claude dir. Added resolveSpecDir(gitRoot:specId:) that finds spec dir by prefix match under .auto-claude/specs/. Added loadAcPlan(cardURL:specId:) that combines both to load implementation_plan.json. Updated preparePreviewOfFile to load AcPlan when meta.acSpecId is set and pass it to BopCardPreview. Changed acPlan from @State to regular var since it's set once from controller. BUILD SUCCEEDED.

subtasks.description: Implement planTab(@ViewBuilder) method in BopCardPreview: overall progress bar (same style as subtasksTab header), per-phase collapsible rows with SF Symbol icons (circle.fill=done, circle.lefthalf.filled=partial, circle=not-started), subtask rows with checkmark.circle.fill (completed/green), arrow.triangle.2.circlepath (in_progress/amber), circle (pending/dim). Phase name row background matches existing card row style.

verification.command: xcodebuild -project macos/macos.xcodeproj -scheme JobCardHost -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | tail -5

subtasks.notes: Implemented full planTab() @ViewBuilder in BopCardPreview with: (1) Overall progress bar showing N of M subtasks complete + percentage, same style as subtasksTab header. (2) Per-phase collapsible rows with SF Symbol icons: circle.fill (done/green via .stageActive), circle.lefthalf.filled (partial/amber via .pillOrange), circle (not started/dim via .textMuted). (3) Subtask rows with: checkmark.circle.fill (completed/green), arrow.triangle.2.circlepath (in_progress/amber), circle (pending/dim). (4) Phase header rows use existing card row style (Color.black.opacity(0.15) + RoundedRectangle border). (5) Added @State collapsedPhases: Set<String> for expand/collapse toggle. (6) Extracted phaseIconInfo() and subtaskIconInfo() helper functions to avoid @ViewBuilder issues with if/switch assignments. BUILD SUCCEEDED.

phases.name: dispatch.nu — Card Linkage
phases.description: Update dispatch.nu to write ac_spec_id to matching card's meta.json when dispatching a spec.

subtasks.description: In dispatch.nu run_spec function (after write_approval), add logic to search .cards/ state dirs for a card whose meta.json id matches the spec slug or title contains the spec ID. If found, read meta.json, add/update ac_spec_id field, write back. Use nu's open/save json commands. This is the dogfood path — non-fatal if no matching card found.

verification.instructions: Verify dispatch.nu parses correctly: nu --no-config-file -c 'source dispatch.nu; echo ok'

subtasks.notes: Added link_card_to_spec function to dispatch.nu that searches .cards/ state dirs (pending, running, done, failed, merged) — both flat and team-prefixed — for a card whose meta.json id matches the spec slug or contains the spec ID. When found, reads meta.json, upserts ac_spec_id field, writes back with `to json --indent 2 | save --force`. Wired into run_spec after write_approval. Non-fatal: prints skip message if no matching card. Safe patterns: try/catch with null fallback (not continue in catch), mut found_meta with break on match. Nu command blocked in sandbox so manual syntax review only — no runtime parse test.

phases.name: Verification + Output
phases.description: Run make check, create output/result.md with ASCII screenshot and Quick Look tab description.

subtasks.description: Run make check (cargo test + clippy + fmt --check). Fix any warnings or failures.
subtasks.notes: make check passed with zero issues. cargo test: 953 tests passed (846 bop-cli + 106 bop-core + 1 doc-test). cargo clippy: 0 warnings. cargo fmt --check: 0 formatting issues. No code fixes were needed.

subtasks.description: Create output/result.md with: (1) ASCII screenshot showing bop list output with the new AC progress bar and half-circle glyph, (2) description of the Plan tab in Quick Look with its SF Symbol icon rendering, (3) summary of all changes made.
subtasks.notes: Created output/result.md with: (1) ASCII screenshot of bop list showing the new AC progress bar with 16-cell block bar, N/T subtask count, current phase name, and half-circle glyph (○◔◑◕●). (2) Detailed description of the Quick Look Plan tab including tab bar appearance, plan layout with overall progress bar + per-phase collapsible sections, SF Symbol icon table for phase status (circle.fill/circle.lefthalf.filled/circle) and subtask status (checkmark.circle.fill/arrow.triangle.2.circlepath/circle), interaction model (tap to collapse), and git root discovery mechanism. (3) Comprehensive summary of all changes across 5 services: bop-core (ac_spec_id field), bop-cli (new acplan.rs module, renderer updates, list wiring), macOS Quick Look (Plan tab, Codable structs, SF Symbol rendering), and dispatch.nu (link_card_to_spec function).

parallel_groups.reason: phase-3 depends on phase-2 (sequential with phases 1-2), but phase-4 and phase-5 only depend on phase-1 (data model). phase-4 (Swift) and phase-5 (Nushell) modify completely different files from phase-3 (Rust CLI). All three can run in parallel after phase-1 completes, but phase-3 requires phase-2 first.

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential is safest — phase-3 depends on phase-2 which is the heaviest Rust work. Quick Look and dispatch.nu changes are light.

summary.startup_command: PYTHONPATH=$(python3 -c 'import site; print(site.getsitepackages()[0])') env -u CLAUDECODE python3 /Applications/Auto-Claude.app/Contents/Resources/backend/run.py --spec 027 --project-dir /Users/studio/bop --direct

acceptance_criteria: Meta has ac_spec_id: Option<String> field (serde rename ac_spec_id)
bop list renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with ac_spec_id
bop status --watch reloads plan on file changes
Quick Look shows Plan tab when ac_spec_id resolves to a readable plan
Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
output/result.md with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab

verification_steps.name: Cargo Test
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All tests pass including new ac_spec_id and acplan tests

verification_steps.name: Xcode Build
verification_steps.command: xcodebuild -project macos/macos.xcodeproj -scheme JobCardHost -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | tail -5

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk: adds new field to core data model (backward-compatible via serde defaults), new module in CLI, new tab in Quick Look. All changes are additive — no existing behavior is altered.
